responseText:
As of **Feb 17, 2026 ~3:18 PM PKT**, spot gold is about **$5,022 per troy ounce** (≈ **$161.46/gram**, **$1,883.29/tola**). ([xau.today](https://xau.today/?utm_source=openai))

Using a **USD→PKR ~279.625** mid-market rate, that’s roughly **PKR 1,404,305/oz**, **PKR 45,148/gram**, **PKR 526,600/tola** (before local premiums/making charges). ([wise.com](https://wise.com/hk/compare/wise-usd-to-pkr?utm_source=openai))  
For a local reference, one Pakistan market quote shows **~PKR 523,660 per tola (24K)**. ([todaysgoldrate.pk](https://todaysgoldrate.pk/gold-rate/weight-unit/tola/?utm_source=openai))

Is it a good time to buy?
- If you’re investing long-term/hedging, consider **buying in small tranches (DCA)** rather than trying to time a top; gold has been volatile and near recent highs.
- If you need it short-term or you’re price-sensitive, you may prefer to **wait for pullbacks** and compare local sarafa rates/premiums.
